name: Apple Cheddar Cookies
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 cups Apples, cored and peeled, chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the butter and sugar until light and fluffy.
2. Stir in the egg and vanilla extract.
3. Add the combined dry ingredients (flour, baking soda, cinnamon, salt) to the mixture and blend well.
4. Stir in the cheddar cheese, apples, and nuts.
5. Drop rounded teaspoonfuls of the dough onto an ungreased cookie sheet.
6. Bake at 375 degrees F. for 15 minutes.
7. Remove from the cookie sheet and cool on a wire rack or plate.
